global.description: The ad features a combination of abstract graphics and text elements focused on financial clarity.
global.main_message: Promoting financial clarity and peace of mind.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring abstract shapes, possibly a circle and a square, rendered in a muted color palette.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A secondary graphic element that complements the central graphic, maintaining a similar muted color scheme.

elements.label: Overlay graphic
elements.description: An overlay graphic that adds depth to the design, featuring abstract shapes in a subtle manner.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, clear text stating 'Your money, clearer' with a smaller tagline 'Built for peace of mind' beneath it.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'SwiftStack' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button labeled 'Start now' positioned at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with muted tones, financial clarity message
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
